chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1255 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: « اَللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لِأُمَّتِي فِي بُكُورِهَا يَوْمَ سَبْتِهَا وَ خَمِيسِهَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1255 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"O’ Allah (swt), bless my Ummah (community) in its early morning on their Saturdays and Thursdays."
